//Sia: Internal env is the DEFAULT base: in the hosted internal deployment set Sia:WorkspaceId to the internal SI workspace customerId (GUID), Sia:OpenAiEndpoint + Sia:OpenAiDeployment to the SI Azure OpenAI deployment (AI on by default). Leave WorkspaceId empty for the demo fallback. NO secrets/IDs are committed here - the host (App Service / Container App settings, Key-Vault-backed) supplies them.
